title: viola mandshurica var. triangularis
intro: Viola mandshurica var. triangularis, also known as Triangular-leaved Violet or Yellow Archangel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is a perennial herb native to East Asia, traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Viola mandshurica var. triangularis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential effects in treating cancer, diabetes, and neurodegenerative diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or using a solvent to extract the bioactive compounds.
